question: Based on these maps, what can you conclude about whether property crime rates are more unevenly distributed across states than violent crime rates?

options.A: Property crime rates are clearly more unevenly distributed across states than violent crime rates
options.B: Violent crime rates are clearly more unevenly distributed across states than property crime rates
options.C: Both types of crime show a similar level of unevenness across states
options.D: The maps do not provide enough information to reliably compare how unevenly the two crime types are distributed across states

explanation: The two maps use the SAME threshold scale even though their value distributions differ. That makes one map saturate in a single color while the other uses multiple colors, creating a misleading impression about which has more variation. The reliable conclusion is that variation cannot be judged from these maps alone.
